ogTitle: Neuarpurr vs New Gisborne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neuarpurr and New Gisborne.
heading: Neuarpurr vs New Gisborne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neuarpurr, Victoria and New Gisborne, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neuarpurr has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to New Gisborne (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neuarpurr or New Gisborne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neuarpurr has a flood risk score of 29/100, while New Gisborne scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neuarpurr scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. New Gisborne scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neuarpurr or New Gisborne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neuarpurr has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
